since_last: 49% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.05%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 49% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.79% · BTC +0.18% · Gold +0.46% · Nasdaq100 +1.68%. 49% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.05%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.05%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.84%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +10.15%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +10.15%, META +6.25%, NOW +4.62%, CRM +4.14%, WDAY +4.06%. Laggards: MU -5.33%, MRVL -4.64%, AMAT -4.62%, LRCX -4.23%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.02% at $170.82
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.02% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
